recent_fixes: Landing page live campaigns grid made fully dynamic — campaignModel.findAll/findById/findByStatus/findByNgoId all LEFT JOIN ngo_profiles so ngoName is returned in every campaign response.
First-run database seeder (src/seed.js) added — auto-creates 1 admin user, 1 NGO user, 1 verified NGO profile, and 6 active campaigns across all categories on empty DB startup.
Test-account seeder (src/seedTest.js) added — run via `npm run seed:test` to upsert testadmin@kapitbisig.ph and testngo@kapitbisig.ph; INSERT IGNORE so safe to re-run.

Sign-in separation: SignIn.html is now donor-only (admin/NGO are rejected and redirected to AdminLogIn.html). AdminLogIn.html now accepts ngo role in addition to admin/superadmin. Cross-portal links added to both pages.

legend.P0: Blocker — must be done before launch

modules.name: Sign Up / Registration
modules.notes: Backend signup, Gmail validation, post-signup redirect to Profile, and auth-aware nav (hide Sign In/Sign Up, show Profile) are all complete. Blocked on Google and Facebook OAuth app registration.

tasks.task: Save user to MySQL users table
Redirect to Profile page after signup
Hide Sign In / Sign Up buttons when logged in
Show Profile icon/section in nav when logged in

modules.name: Log In
modules.notes: Login, session, forgot-password flow (token gen + reset endpoint), redirect, and auth-aware nav all complete. Sign-in portals are now separated: SignIn.html is donor-only; AdminLogIn.html handles admin + NGO with role enforcement and cross-portal links. OAuth login and forgot-password email blocked on external registrations/SMTP config. Rate limiter scoped to POST /signin only.

tasks.task: Password reset token generation & expiry (1 hr)
Password reset — validate token & update password
Redirect based on role after login (donor → Landing, admin/NGO → AdminDashboard)
Hide Sign In / Sign Up; show Profile on login
Separate donor vs admin/NGO sign-in portals with role enforcement

modules.name: Campaigns — Donor View
modules.notes: All donor-facing campaign features implemented. Likes and comments have dedicated backend routes and DB tables (campaign_likes, campaign_comments). Campaigns.js wired to API for likes, comments, donation stats (30s polling). Share link is dynamic using ?id= URL param. Auth-aware nav added to Campaign.html.

tasks.task: Display transparency details (NGO info, goal, raised)
Real-time donation total updates (WebSocket or polling)
Progress bar updates on new donation

modules.name: Payment Integration
modules.notes: Donation form UI exists. Backend donation model, creation endpoint, and campaign amount update logic are implemented — but no payment gateway is wired. Blocked on GCash/PayMaya merchant accounts.

tasks.task: Create donation record in DB on success
Update campaign totals after confirmed payment
Sandbox / test mode for all payment methods

modules.name: NGO Dashboard — Campaign Application
modules.notes: All tasks complete. ngo-05: backend now accepts ngoId query param in GET /campaigns; frontend filters campaign list by ngoId when role is ngo; saveCampaign/submitCampaign wired to real API (CampaignAPI.create + submitForApproval) with grid refresh after each action; rejectionReason shown in campaign detail modal; fixed ID type mismatch in openCampaignDetail. ngo-04: sendNewSubmissionNotificationEmail added to emailService; called non-blocking from submitForApproval service; ADMIN_EMAIL env var added.

tasks.task: Store submitted campaign with status=pending in DB
Notify Admin of new campaign submission
NGO can view submission status in dashboard
Form fields: title, bank details, description, purpose

modules.name: NGO Dashboard — Analytics
modules.notes: Backend GET /ngos/:id/analytics endpoint built (model → service → controller → route). Frontend wired: stats cards, daily donations bar chart, campaign pie chart, monthly donor growth line chart, recent activity feed. 10-second setInterval polling starts when NGO navigates to analytics page and stops on page leave.

modules.name: Admin Dashboard
modules.notes: All tasks complete. adm-03: loadDashboardData wired to live API; fixed ngosRes.profiles key mismatch; NGO name resolved via ngoMap. adm-05: rejection_reason column added to campaigns table; stored on reject; nodemailer emailService created (gracefully no-ops if SMTP not configured); rejection email sent to NGO user; frontend reject modal requires a reason and passes it to the API.

tasks.task: Approve campaign → set status=approved, make public
Reject campaign → set status=rejected, send reason to NGO
Activity log for all admin actions

modules.name: Landing Page
modules.notes: All landing page tasks complete. Live campaign listing section fetches GET /api/campaigns?status=active&limit=6. Campaign cards now display NGO name via LEFT JOIN on ngo_profiles. Stats strip fixed (ngosRes.profiles key). First-run seeder provides 6 active campaigns so the grid is never empty.

tasks.task: Public campaign listing on landing page
Hide Sign In / Sign Up for logged-in users
Show Profile icon / section for logged-in users

modules.name: User Profile Page
modules.notes: All profile page tasks complete. Avatar/cover photo upload now persists — base64 stored in avatar_url/cover_url MEDIUMTEXT columns; restored on load. Notification preferences persisted as JSON in notification_prefs TEXT column; each toggle has data-pref attribute; relabel/enableAll both call markDirty. updateProfile model accepts dynamic field updates. toPublicUser exposes avatarUrl, coverUrl, notificationPrefs. ALTER TABLE migrations run at startup for existing DBs.

tasks.task: Display user name, email, profile picture

modules.name: Database & Backend Infrastructure
modules.notes: Core schema and all implemented feature tables complete with parameterized queries throughout. First-run seeder (src/seed.js) auto-creates default admin, NGO profile, and 6 active campaigns on empty DB. Test-account seeder (src/seedTest.js) available via npm run seed:test. Campaign queries now LEFT JOIN ngo_profiles for ngoName in all list/detail responses.

tasks.task: First-run database seeder with default admin, NGO, and campaigns

blockers.description: GCash and PayMaya merchant accounts not yet registered — required before payment API integration can begin
Google OAuth app not yet registered in Google Cloud Console
Facebook OAuth app not yet registered in Meta Developer Portal

SMTP credentials not yet configured in .env (SMTP_HOST/USER/PASS) — emailService.js is implemented and will send once credentials are added. Only blocks Forgot Password email (li-08) now; campaign rejection emails are code-complete.

next_priorities: Configure SMTP + ADMIN_EMAIL in .env to activate rejection and submission notification emails (blk-04)
Register Google and Facebook OAuth apps (blk-02, blk-03)
Apply for GCash / PayMaya merchant accounts (blk-01)
Payment gateway integration — GCash / PayMaya via Paymongo (pay-02 through pay-09)

summary.frontend_pages_status: Complete — 14 HTML pages built covering all major flows. Donor and Admin/NGO sign-in portals separated with role enforcement and cross-portal navigation links.
summary.backend_status: Core MVC stack fully built — auth, campaigns, donations, NGO, admin routes all implemented with parameterized queries and RBAC. Email service (nodemailer) added. First-run seeder and test-account seeder both in place. Campaign queries LEFT JOIN ngo_profiles for NGO name in all responses.
summary.critical_gap: Payment gateway integration (blocked on merchant accounts), OAuth login (blocked on app registration), SMTP credentials for email features
